label: Thruster Efficiency
description: Optimized fuel injectors reduce thruster fuel use. Thrust, brake, and RCS burn: Lvl 1 ×0.75, Lvl 2 ×0.5, Lvl 3 ×0.25 (vs stock ×1).

label: Thruster Charge
description: Improved capacitors accelerate thruster bar recharge. All three bars: Lvl 1 ×1.5, Lvl 2 ×2, Lvl 3 ×2.5 (vs stock ×1).

label: Thruster Speed
description: Overclocked thrust nozzles increase boost strength and RCS authority. Lvl 1 ×1.25, Lvl 2 ×1.5, Lvl 3 ×1.75 (vs stock ×1).

label: Efficient Systems
description: Low-power avionics cut always-on shuttle fuel drain. Passive systems: stock 3/s, Lvl 1 2/s, Lvl 2 1/s, Lvl 3 off (fuel units per second).

label: Hull Upgrade
description: Reinforced hull plating raises max HP. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Heat Shield
description: Ablative coating cuts hot drift and overheat damage. Thermal tuning ×0.7 / ×0.45 / ×0.25 per tier (calmer = lower). Lvl 1: survives Venus. Lvl 2: survives Mercury. Lvl 3: survives Sun proximity.

label: Cryo Insulation
description: Thermal lining cuts cold drift and freeze damage. Cryo tuning ×0.7 / ×0.45 / ×0.25 per tier. Lvl 2: cold-zone caps at Jupiter and Saturn. Lvl 3: caps at Uranus, Neptune, and Pluto (Lvl 1 improves damping before those caps).

label: Radiation Shielding
description: Lead-lined compartments reduce ionizing exposure. Lvl 1: survives Mercury orbit. Lvl 2: survives between Mercury and the Sun. Lvl 3: survives Sun proximity.

label: Cargo Bay Expansion
description: Modular cargo frame increases inventory mass allowance. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Fuel Tank Expansion
description: Auxiliary fuel bladder extends the shuttle tank. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Science Station
description: Onboard lab multiplies mission CR on completion (stacks with multitool Science). Lvl 1 ×1.25, Lvl 2 ×1.5, Lvl 3 ×1.75 (vs stock ×1).

label: Slingshot Speed
description: Gravity-assist tuning raises slingshot exit speed and the cruise you settle to after the burst. Lvl 0: burst ×2, cruise ×1. Lvl 1: burst ×3, cruise ×1.25. Lvl 2: burst ×3.5, cruise ×1.375. Lvl 3: burst ×5, cruise ×1.75.

label: Gravity Surfing
description: Calibrated inertial senses let you read local spacetime curvature — unlocking the Space Fabric overlay on the solar map. One rank: off at Lvl 0, on at Lvl 1 (not sold in engineering).

label: Orbital Surfing
description: Military-cleared package that couples the shuttle to the solar-system manifold — phase-aligned corridors along each planet’s orbital path for high-speed transfer. One rank: off at Lvl 0, on at Lvl 1 (not sold in engineering).

label: Thruster Efficiency
description: Refined propellant mix lowers lander fuel burn per thrust. Lvl 1 ×0.75, Lvl 2 ×0.5, Lvl 3 ×0.25 (vs stock ×1).

label: Thruster Charge
description: Faster recharge on the main engine and RCS thruster bars. Lvl 1 ×1.5, Lvl 2 ×2, Lvl 3 ×2.5 (vs stock ×1).

label: Thruster Power
description: Stronger engine bells and RCS — more thrust and acceleration. Lvl 1 ×1.25, Lvl 2 ×1.5, Lvl 3 ×1.75 (vs stock ×1).

label: Hull Upgrade
description: Impact-resistant frame raises lander max HP. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Fuel Tank Expansion
description: Extended lander tank volume. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Instrument Efficiency
description: Power-saving circuits cut RTG fuel drain while using multitool modes. Lvl 1 ×0.75, Lvl 2 ×0.5, Lvl 3 ×0.25 (vs stock ×1).

label: Damage Output
description: Amplified emitter increases damage to targets. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: RTG Capacity
description: Larger radioisotope core — more charge in the multitool battery. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: RTG Charge Boost
description: Each random charge pickup restores more energy. Pickup strength: Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Science Upgrade
description: Enhanced sensors multiply mission CR on completion (stacks with shuttle Science Station). Lvl 1 ×1.25, Lvl 2 ×1.5, Lvl 3 ×1.75 (vs stock ×1).

label: Suit Armor
description: Hardened exosuit plating increases max hit points. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Stamina Capacity
description: Muscle-assist servos extend sprint and jump stamina pools. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Stamina Efficiency
description: Efficient rebreather — less O₂ lost to sprint drain and less O₂ spent refilling stamina when idle. Lvl 1 ×0.75, Lvl 2 ×0.5, Lvl 3 ×0.25 (vs stock ×1; lower is thriftier).

label: O2 Capacity
description: High-pressure tanks carry more breathable oxygen. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.65, Lvl 3 ×2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Mobility Upgrade
description: Low-friction joints improve walk speed, sprint speed, and jump force together. Lvl 1 ×1.15, Lvl 2 ×1.35, Lvl 3 ×1.5 (vs stock ×1).

label: Mining Turret Mount
description: Installs a hull-mounted mining laser. One rank: off at Lvl 0, hull turret + map control at Lvl 1. Press T from the map to operate.

label: Turret Focus Array
description: Tighter beam focus increases ore mined per second. Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.75, Lvl 3 ×2.25 (vs stock ×1).

label: Turret Cooling Loop
description: Accelerates mining-laser recharge after overheat. Recovery rate: Lvl 1 ×1.35, Lvl 2 ×1.75, Lvl 3 ×2.2 (vs stock ×1).

label: Turret Power Regulator
description: Cuts shuttle fuel burned while the mining beam is active. Lvl 1 ×0.75, Lvl 2 ×0.55, Lvl 3 ×0.4 (vs stock ×1).
